description:
The rng-tools package can be installed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf install rng-tools
rationale:
<tt>rng-tools</tt> provides hardware random number generator tools,
such as those used in the formation of x509/PKI certificates.
ocil_clause: the rng-tools package is not installed
ocil:
Run the following command to determine if the rng-tools package is installed: 
$ rpm -q rng-tools
fixtext:
To install the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 package rng-tools run the following command:

$ sudo dnf install rng-tools
srg_requirement: Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 must have the rng-tools package installed.

stig.srg_requirement: Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 must have the rng-tools package installed.
stig.vuldiscussion: "rng-tools" provides hardware random number generator tools, such as those used in the formation of x509/PKI certificates.
stig.checktext:
Verify that Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 has the rng-tools package installed with the following command:

$ dnf list --installed rng-tools

Example output:

rng-tools.x86_64          6.14-2.git.b2b7934e.el9

If the "rng-tools" package is not installed, this is a finding.
stig.fixtext:
The rng-tools package can be installed with the following command:

$ sudo dnf install rng-tools

title: Install rng-tools Package
